title: Admin Panel+
description:
This makes it Easy to Control Your Server All in an Admin Panel, making it very easy for Moderators.
the mod requires to be on Client-side to get the GUI, only required client-side for Admins/Moderators
body:
--------------------------
- This Mod needs to be installed onto the Server
--------------------------

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/3XeW1FhOsx0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**This video is an outdated version of this mod, its using the Alpha version, this video will be updated in the future hopefully.**

This mod adds more to your world so doing stuff is easy!
this mod adds:

 
- Time Changer

- Weather Changer

- Server Shutdown Button

- Toggleable Coords

- Game Mode Changer

- Teleporter

- Ban

- Kick

- Kill

- Tellraw

- Player Warning

To give High-Level Administrator you use /hla (selector) true/false

To get Access to the Admin Panel you need to use the /admin_give (selector) command

To Take Access from players to use the panel you need to type the /admin_take (selector) command
